item.title: We should pull no punches in describing this accurately because the ideology being used to justify this extra extraordinary and ...
item.description:
We should pull no punches in describing this accurately because the ideology being used to justify this extra extraordinary and incredible v*olence is not new and it is not specific, and it is not unique.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Lily having just come back from a Flotilla to Cuba bringing humanitarian aid to the nation that America is starving, talks about...
item.description:
Lily having just come back from a Flotilla to Cuba bringing humanitarian aid to the nation that America is starving, talks about how one of the most effective things the American propaganda machine has done is deprive anyone of a point of comparison for the depravity in the empire



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: It’s almost like I actually care about live experience of people and that is why I know how certain people lived experience actu...
item.description:
It’s almost like I actually care about live experience of people and that is why I know how certain people lived experience actually affected their politics rather than just taking whatever the empire presents to me



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Before mentioning that thousands have already been murdered in strikes against educational medical and civilian infrastructure i...
item.description:
Before mentioning that thousands have already been murdered in strikes against educational medical and civilian infrastructure in Iran you fearmonger about American citizens. #greenscreenvideo
